# Discord → Perplexity unification (Cycle 3)

Fuses the official Discord docs index (`https://docs.discord.com/llms.txt`) into
the local Perplexity unification path as a **pointer catalog**. No Discord API
calls, no tokens, no posting from this surface.

## Generated by `eden/discord_pplx_unify.py`

```bash
python eden/discord_pplx_unify.py --validate     # bounded-policy check
python eden/discord_pplx_unify.py --markdown      # DISCORD_PPLX_UNIFY.md handoff
python eden/discord_pplx_unify.py --out cat.json  # machine catalog
```

## Lanes

| Lane | Docs focus | Local mapping | Phase |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `webhooks` | platform webhooks + webhook resource | `discord_bridge` (primary) | MERGED_LOCAL |
| `bots_apps` | bots, first app, application commands | optional bot + channel id | commands_wired |
| `activities_party` | Activities / multiplayer / local dev | party_round + Fable5 :5619 (later) | docs_only_until_smoke_green |
| `social_layer` | Social SDK / rich presence | deferred | **deferred (needs approval)** |
| `policy_safety` | ToS, rate limits, OAuth | always on | always_on |

## Webhook posture

Webhook mode is **`ARMED_AWAITING_TOKEN`** and stays that way in this repo. Going
live is an operator action performed elsewhere: put `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL` in
`~/ShadowGarden/.env` and run the bridge there. The boundary-guard hook prompts
for explicit confirmation on any `discord_bridge merge` / webhook command.

## For central Perplexity chat, attach

1. `PERPLEXITY_CONTEXT_BEDROCK.md`
2. `fable5-compact.json`
3. `DISCORD_PPLX_UNIFY.md`
4. Optional: `DISCORD_BRIDGE_STATUS.json`

Central task pointer (no scrape): `2366bfee-b78c-4ddc-9f86-304c30c67c4d`.

## Playable vertical slice

The uploaded game files are wired under `eden/game/` as the locally runnable
party-game slice:

```bash
cd eden/game && npm run smoke                       # all three sims, fixed seeds
node --test eden/game/simulations/slice.test.mjs    # determinism + scheduler asserts
```

See `eden/game/simulations/README.md`.
